soulWeapons.name: Inferno Blade
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Burn: 10% chance to inflict Burn dealing 5% ATK/s for 3s

soulWeapons.name: Volcanic Greatsword
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Eruption: kills trigger AoE burst dealing 150% ATK

soulWeapons.name: Tidal Trident
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Freeze: 8% chance to freeze enemy for 2s

soulWeapons.name: Abyssal Bow
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Torrent: every 5th shot deals 200% ATK to all enemies

soulWeapons.name: Granite Hammer
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Quake: attacks have 12% chance to stun for 1.5s

soulWeapons.name: Tectonic Axe
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Landslide: every kill reduces cooldowns by 1s

soulWeapons.name: Cyclone Scythe
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Whirlwind: attacks hit all enemies in a 2m radius

soulWeapons.name: Radiant Sword
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Holy Smite: +15% dmg vs Dark enemies; heals 2% max HP/kill

soulWeapons.name: Divine Spear
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Judgement: 15% chance to instantly slay enemy below 20% HP

soulWeapons.name: Void Staff
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Curse: reduce enemy DEF by 20% for 5s on hit

soulWeapons.name: Reaper Scythe
soulWeapons.specialEffect: Soul Drain: 20% of damage dealt restores HP
